data_source_summary: PM-KISAN Central Notification (December 1, 2018); Chhattisgarh Economic Survey 2024-25; Outcome Budget 2025-26; CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25; pmkisan.gov.in portal

Q30.r: PM-KISAN is a Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) cash scheme with no physical or intangible commons resource. Scheme guidelines mandate no replenishment, regeneration, or renewal rule of any kind — no afforestation obligation, no recharge structure requirement, no grazing rotation mandate, no seed bank renewal obligation, no knowledge-transmission cadre, and no BMC ABS reinvestment clause. The scheme's sole operational mandate is to disburse ₹6,000/year to eligible landholding farmers. No conservation or stewardship obligation is attached to beneficiary receipt. Score = No → AUTOMATIC T4 FAIL (Near-SOC Structural classification).
Q30.src: PM-KISAN Official Notification December 1, 2018 (scheme obligations: farmer verification, Aadhaar/bank linkage, DBT only); Chhattisgarh Economic Survey 2024-25; CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25

Q31.r: T1.1 = 'C' (private land) ≠ 'E'. Per track selection rule, T1.1 ≠ E → RhoRatio track applies. Q32 is answered; Q33 is set to SKIP.

Q32.v: <<UNVERIFIED: ρ cannot be computed. PM-KISAN (T1.1 = C) involves no commons resource. There is no extraction of any commons enabled by the scheme, and no replenishment mechanism exists (Q30 = No). Annual extraction rate = 0 (no commons to extract from); annual replenishment rate = 0 (none mandated). ρ = 0/0 is mathematically undefined. No proxy measurement methodology applicable.>>
Q32.calc: ρ = extraction ÷ replenishment = 0 ÷ 0 = undefined. No commons resource exists under this scheme; extraction and replenishment rates are both zero. Numerator and denominator both collapse to zero, making ρ undefined rather than a computed ratio.
Q32.interp: FAIL — ρ is undefined (no commons resource; no extraction; no replenishment mandated). T4 fails by virtue of Q30 = No (T4.1 = 0) and the absence of any sustainability structure.
Q32.src: PM-KISAN Official Notification; CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25 (no NRM, replenishment, or commons expenditure recorded)
docs: CAG State Accounts Report 2024-25 (fund flow: 100% DBT, zero NRM/commons expenditure)
